reasoning_model_1: The user's command content is provided in English ('Modern smart home appliances are so convenient, saving a lot of effort.'). model_comparison: Model 1 fails the evaluation at the most basic level by responding in the wrong language (Chinese response to English input), necessitating a score of 0 according to the evaluation guidelines.
